_comment: Drinks suppliers for De Sering. Extracted June 2026 from the live inventory sheet + wine form + supplier email threads (Mar-May 2026). NO CREDENTIALS here by design — portal logins belong in env/secret storage.

suppliers.name: Two Chefs Brewing
suppliers.products: Draft kegs + cans: Premium Pilsner (Holy Gunter), Funky Falcon, Green Bullet, White Mamba, Sering Blonde, Bon Chef, Funky Falcon 0.2%
suppliers.notes: More Holy Gunter needed on weeks with a large party.

suppliers.name: Kweker
suppliers.products: Erdinger 0.0%, juices, sparkling water, spirits, glasswash, ice bags; backup for Fritz/Club Mate
suppliers.orderDaysNote: Sheet 2026: beer Tue+Thu (next day 7am); soft/spirits Mon+Thu (deliver Wed & Fri). Older wine form said Wed+Sat — sheet wins.

suppliers.name: Troppo Giovane
suppliers.products: House Red (Tule Nero d'Avola, boxes of 6), House White (Tule Bianco, keg), Troppo Macerato orange
suppliers.minimumOrder: Free delivery above €500 ex VAT in Amsterdam (≈72 house-wine bottles); below that a delivery fee may apply
suppliers.notes: IMPORTANT process rule from supplier: write a NEW email for every order — reusing old threads causes delays. Price list: 'Troppo_Horeca_March_2026.pdf' (email 1/4/2026) — see pricelists note in DRINKS_DOMAIN §8.

suppliers.name: Daxivin
suppliers.products: House Rosé (Mas d'Intras), Orange (Ginja Ninja), Bubbles (Tonello Marachelle petnat), Chardonnay 0.0% (Bio Opia)
suppliers.minimumOrder: Horeca pricing requires whole boxes of 6 bottles
suppliers.notes: Other wines vary — see wine forms. Affordable rosé bag-in-box coming (not yet on list). Price list: 'HORECA MRT 2026.pdf' (email 27/3/2026).

suppliers.name: Pomme d'Or
suppliers.products: Cider: Cidre AOC Pays d'Auge '22 + Giard Cider — cases of 6 bottles
suppliers.orderDaysNote: In practice next-day or same-week delivery on email orders (Mar–May 2026 threads)
suppliers.notes: Typical orders 36 bottles (6 cases). Price list: 'Prijslijst Pomme dOr februari2026 Cider horeca def.pdf' (email 27/3/2026).
suppliers.priceListRef: Prijslijst Pomme dOr februari2026 Cider horeca def.pdf (email from info@pommedor.nl, 2026-03-27)

suppliers.name: Dorstlust
suppliers.products: Club Mate, Fritz sodas, Three Cents sodas/tonic/ginger beer
suppliers.notes: If unavailable, fall back to Kweker or Hanos (mind the sizes).

suppliers.name: Hanos
suppliers.products: ROA oat milk, teas, chai, backup for sodas/spirits, fresh mint/ginger, bar consumables
suppliers.deliveryWindow: Tuesdays & Fridays (next day 10am for some categories)
suppliers.notes: Emergency replacement source; compare prices vs Kweker. Login lives in env/secrets, not here.

suppliers.name: Yoigokochi
suppliers.products: Yuzu Sake (supply gaps happen — was out of stock Mar 2026, restocked Apr)
suppliers.minimumOrder: €21 flat delivery fee regardless of size — order a lot (typical order: 30 bottles)
suppliers.notes: Prices ex VAT. Price list: 'Yoigokochi product list 2024 HORECA 20240915.pdf' — 2024 list confirmed still valid April 2026.
suppliers.priceListRef: Yoigokochi product list 2024 HORECA 20240915.pdf (email from sake@yoigokochi.eu, 2026-04-07)

suppliers.name: Friedhats
suppliers.notes: Login lives in env/secrets, not here.

suppliers.name: Vleck Wijnen
suppliers.notes: Appears in the 2024 wine form supplier list; confirm if still active.

suppliers.name: Homemade
suppliers.products: All recipe-mode drinks (cocktail premixes, syrups, super juices, kombucha, ice teas)
suppliers.orderDaysNote: Production, not ordering — appears on the to-make list instead of order lists
suppliers.notes: Try to input recipes far ahead.
